violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

At time of inspection, ash tray with cigarette was observed on prep table. EMPLOYEES shall eat, drink, or use any form of tobacco only in designated areas where the contamination of exposed FOOD; clean EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, and LINENS; unwrapped SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES; or other items needing protection cannot result. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The quaternary ammonium sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 200-400 ppm. PIC called for service at time of inspection. PIC informed that 3 bay sink is to be used to sanitize until proof of service has been sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

Pasta was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
Several ceiling tiles were observed with brown stains from previous water damage. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The wall coving in the front kitchen area is in poor repair, observed incomplete seal with missing pieces throughout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
